title: ctenitis crinita
intro: Ctenitis crinita, also known as the hairy fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Ctenitis and family Dryopteridaceae. The hairy fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis crinita include reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and the dried leaves can be used in herbal infusions, capsules, or tinctures, making it a versatile option for herbal remedies.
